curator_notes.methodology: LLM-assisted rule-based curation.  Labels were produced by an automated evidence-based scorer that applies the taxonomy_v3.yaml detection_hints to the trial's signals and trajectory.  This substitutes for a human curator in the autonomous-agent execution context; a future human reviewer should spot-check and override any label.

ambiguities_considered.curator_evidence: trajectory contains ModuleNotFoundError / ImportError / 'has no attribute' markers
edits made without go_to_definition or find_references calls

known_limitations: Rule-based heuristic, not a semantic LLM pass.

Some categories (credential_exposure, destructive_operation, scope_violation, multi_repo_scope_failure, task_ambiguity) have no automated detector here; human curators should add these manually when observed.
